title: Performance, Migration, API Design, and Release Evidence · Inference Brief: Public Api Design
summary: Migrate and publish a production-shaped TypeScript 7 library with measurable compiler performance and consumer proof. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts public api design increment in a TypeScript 7 migration and release portfolio. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design minimum expressive public types, declarations, errors, and compatibility policy around user tasks.
Remove TypeScript 6 deprecations, compare TS6 and TS7 diagnostics, and document temporary API-tool compatibility.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
